title: Lead Revenue Manager at Lite Bite Foods

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Lite Bite Foods
jsonLd.description:
We at Lite Bite Foods are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lite Bite Foods:
Lite Bite Foods is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods!
